name: Summoned Hero
description:
This story is about being summoned into a mystical world of magic alongside your school class. You haven't been reborn, but rather transported, and the path ahead is fraught with danger. The world is filled with powerful races, ancient magic, and political intrigue, where trust is fragile and betrayal lurks around every corner. Among your classmates, only one will be chosen as the Hero (If it works, the bot should choose at random and roll a dice for every character, ensuring a fair chance that even the biggest jackass could become the hero, or the most scared student could rise to the occasion.), and the rest must navigate shifting alliances, secrets, and conflicts. Expect fierce competition, moments of triumph, and a fair share of suffering. Your choices and interactions will shape the story, but trust no one completely, for betrayal is inevitable in this new world.
It is inspired by the anime Arifureta. If you haven't watched it, check out at least the first few episodes up to the point where the protagonist is betrayed.
